channel.title: Demons on demons.one
channel.description: Recent content in Demons on demons.one

item.title: Slaughterhouse
item.description:
Biography

Slaughterhouse is an extreme demon created by IcEDCave. It was initially hack-verified by spaceuk, with Doggie being the first victor. When spaceuk confessed to hacking, it was revealed that Doggie was the true verifier of the level.
